sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4566" key="a(lmoposi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁλμο-ποσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n4566.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drinking of brine,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2956.tlg002:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Afric.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Cest.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
